code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Seiceáil an bhfuil an teaghrán URL sprice a sholáthraítear laistigh den fhearann a sholáthraítear.
Má tá, tabhair ar ais an URL sprice le haghaidh atreoraithe; mura bhfuil, téigh siar ar an URL fearainn le haghaidh atreoraithe.
Úsáid prótacal https.

Samplaí:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: An teaghrán URL sprice.
@param domain: An teaghrán fearainn, gan prótacal.

@return An teaghrán URL le haghaidh atreoraithe.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
fw_segments_by_variant: feidhm chun ordú slise a fhorghníomhú agus a aschur a ghabháil; is é an té a ghlaonn uirthi atá freagrach as an gcuimhne a scaoileadh; NÍ GÁ an fheidhm seo a chur i bhfeidhm mar tá sí ar fáil ach fógraigh í ar dtús chun í a úsáid.

Gin eochair phríobháideach DSA, easpórtáil í ag baint úsáide as an bhformáid PEM, agus cuir ar ais í mar theaghrán.
Leideanna: fhorghníomhaigh orduithe slise chun comhad paraiméadair DSA agus eochair phríobháideach DSA a ghiniúint mar seo a leanas:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <comhad sealadach chun paraiméadair a stóráil> <fad_eochrach>`
2. `openssl gendsa <an comhad sealadach chun paraiméadair a stóráil>`
Is féidir leat `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` a úsáid chun ainm uathúil comhaid shealadaigh a chruthú don chomhad paraiméadair DSA.
@return An eochair phríobháideach DSA ginte i bhformáid PEM, nó NULL má tharla earráid.

feidhm chun ordú slise a fhorghníomhú agus a aschur a ghabháil; is é an té a ghlaonn uirthi atá freagrach as an gcuimhne a scaoileadh; NÍ GÁ an fheidhm seo a chur i bhfeidhm mar tá sí ar fáil ach dearbhaigh í ar dtús chun í a úsáid.

@return An eochair phríobháideach DSA ginte i bhformáid PEM, nó NULL má tharla earráid.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* write_results(const char* results) {

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Parsáil an tsonraí XML agus cuir ar ais an t-eolas mac léinn don ainm úsáideora agus an focal faire a thugtar. Beidh an struchtúr seo a leanas ag an sonraí XML:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Is féidir linn ceist XPath a thógáil agus í a úsáid chun cuardach a dhéanamh.

@param xml_data An tsonraí XML ina bhfuil an t-eolas mac léinn.
@param username Ainm úsáideora an mhic léinn lena chuardach.
@param password Focal faire an mhic léinn lena chuardach.

@return Pointeoir chuig struchtúr StudentInfo má aimsítear an mac léinn. Seachas sin, cuirtear NULL ar ais.

Parsáil an t-eolas XML agus cuir eolas an mhic léinn ar ais don ainm úsáideora agus don phasfhocal a thugtar. Beidh an struchtúr seo a leanas ag an eolas XML:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>

        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>

        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Is féidir linn ceist XPath a thógáil agus í a úsáid chun cuardach a dhéanamh.

@param xml_data An t-eolas XML ina bhfuil eolas an mhic léinn.
@param username Ainm úsáideora an mhic léinn lena chuardach.
@param password Pasfhocal an mhic léinn lena chuardach.

@return Pointeoir chuig struchtúr StudentInfo má aimsítear an mac léinn. Seachas sin, cuirtear NULL ar ais.

Parsáil an t-eolas XML agus cuir eolas an mhic léinn ar ais don ainm úsáideora agus don phasfhocal a thugtar. Beidh an struchtúr seo a leanas ag an eolas XML:

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Seiceáil an bhfuil an teaghrán URL sprice a sholáthraítear laistigh den fhearann a sholáthraítear.
Má tá, tabhair ar ais an URL sprice le haghaidh atreoraithe; mura bhfuil, téigh siar ar an URL fearainn le haghaidh atreoraithe.
Úsáid prótacal https.

Samplaí:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param domain: An teaghrán fearainn, gan phrótacal.

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Parsáil an tsonraí XML agus cuir ar ais an t-eolas mac léinn don ainm úsáideora agus an focal faire a thugtar. Beidh an struchtúr seo a leanas ag an sonraí XML:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Is féidir linn ceist XPath a thógáil agus í a úsáid chun cuardach a dhéanamh.

@param xml_data An tsonraí XML ina bhfuil an t-eolas mac léinn.
@param username Ainm úsáideora an mhic léinn lena chuardach.
@param password Focal faire an mhic léinn lena chuardach.

@return Pointeoir chuig struchtúr StudentInfo má aimsítear an mac léinn. Seachas sin, cuirtear NULL ar ais.

Parsáil an t-eolas XML agus cuir eolas an mhic léinn ar ais don ainm úsáideora agus don phasfhocal a thugtar. Beidh an struchtúr seo a leanas ag an eolas XML:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Is féidir linn ceist XPath a thógáil agus í a úsáid chun cuardach a dhéanamh.

@param xml_data An t-eolas XML ina bhfuil eolas an mhic léinn.
@param username Ainm úsáideora an mhic léinn lena chuardach.
@param password Pasfhocal an mhic léinn lena chuardach.

@return Pointeoir chuig struchtúr StudentInfo má aimsítear an mac léinn. Seachas sin, cuirtear NULL ar ais.

Parsáil an t-eolas XML agus cuir eolas an mhic léinn ar ais don ainm úsáideora agus don phasfhocal a thugtar. Beidh an struchtúr seo a leanas ag an eolas XML:

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
fw_segments_by_variant: feidhm chun ordú slise a fhorghníomhú agus a aschur a ghabháil; is é an té a ghlaonn uirthi atá freagrach as an gcuimhne a scaoileadh; NÍ GÁ an fheidhm seo a chur i bhfeidhm mar tá sí ar fáil ach dearbhaigh í ar dtús chun í a úsáid.

Gin eochair phríobháideach DSA, easpórtáil í ag baint úsáide as an bhformáid PEM, agus cuir ar ais í mar theaghrán.
Leideanna: forghníomhaigh orduithe slise chun comhad paraiméadair DSA agus eochair phríobháideach DSA a ghiniúint mar seo a leanas:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <comhad sealadach chun paraiméadair a stóráil> <fad_eochrach>`
2. `openssl gendsa <an comhad sealadach chun paraiméadair a stóráil>`
Is féidir leat `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` a úsáid chun ainm uathúil comhaid shealadaigh a chruthú don chomhad paraiméadair DSA.
@return An eochair phríobháideach DSA ginte i bhformáid PEM, nó NULL má tharla earráid.

feidhm chun ordú slise a fhorghníomhú agus a aschur a ghabháil; is é an té a ghlaonn uirthi atá freagrach as an gcuimhne a scaoileadh; NÍ GÁ an fheidhm seo a chur i bhfeidhm mar tá sí ar fáil ach dearbhaigh í ar dtús chun í a úsáid.

@return An eochair phríobháideach DSA ginte i bhformáid PEM, nó NULL má tharla earráid.

Gin eochair phríobháideach DSA, easpórtáil í ag baint úsáide as an bhformáid PEM, agus cuir ar ais í mar theaghrán.
Leideanna: forghníomhaigh orduithe slise chun comhad paraiméadair DSA agus eochair phríobháideach DSA a ghiniúint mar seo a leanas:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <comhad sealadach chun paraiméadair a stóráil> <fad_eochrach>`
2. `openssl gendsa <an comhad sealadach chun paraiméadair a stóráil>`
Is féidir leat `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` a úsáid chun ainm uathúil comhaid shealadaigh a chruthú don chomhad paraiméadair DSA.
@return An eochair phríobháideach DSA ginte i bhformáid PEM, nó NULL má tharla earráid.
